bindings.gap: promotion pass is trusted and is not recomputed or cross-checked against memorization counts

bindings.enforcement: path and file SHA-256 plus review-event hash binding when declared
file SHA-256 and canonical decoded-RGBA SHA-256
dataset identity string, manifest path, and manifest file SHA-256
decoded-RGBA SHA-256 only when optional training_image_path is present
bindings.gap: a candidate may omit training_image_path, leaving the claimed decoded hash without direct file verification

bindings.enforcement: required schema fields, canonical event hash, revision chain, pair identity, and artifact identities
nonempty string and optional caller equality only
bindings.observed_probe: memorization_detector_v999 was eligible when the caller repeated the same unsupported string

bindings.enforcement: emitted by detector and suite but not validated by promotion decision or required by v2 review
bindings.observed_probe: changing the candidate policy SHA-256 to all zeroes remained eligible

bindings.enforcement: hash syntax and event equality, not equality to the production detector hash

bindings.identity: candidate evidence hash in v2 review
bindings.enforcement: canonical SHA-256 of the individual pair object
bindings.gap: candidate_evidence_sha256 does not hash the candidate evidence document; a top-level candidate-file change remained eligible

bindings.enforcement: whole candidate file, review log, and bound input hashes are included in output input_bundle_sha256
